title: Run six remaining Suco optimizer candidates

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting direct CLI optimizer runs for six Suco candidates: Homeowner Verification AI, Branding/Agent name AI, Recorded Line AI, Pre-Handoff AI, Walk in Tub AI, Property Type AI. Parameters: max_iterations=6, days=90, max_samples=40.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Promoted four improved Suco optimizer winners to champion after verification: Walk in Tub AI -> 48504c95-2a81-47d4-840f-3a025f9b92b8; Recorded Line AI -> 9a011129-a6d0-4144-bed8-19664bcb63c9; Branding/Agent name AI -> d704e73a-ed41-4155-bc70-c35ab4fe4528; Pre-Handoff AI -> b0b5b99d-f0b0-430e-8fe8-18ca11f2e832. Homeowner Verification AI and Property Type AI had no improvement and were not promoted.
